commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=e94ac92c838977f6d009a417666a703d5ff3e4de)
commands.review_summary:
Adds plugin-declared external-action evidence metadata and an agent runtime guard that replaces SMS-style receipt confirmations unless matching current-run tool evidence is recorded across streaming and payload delivery paths.

PR surface: Source +570, Tests +726. Total +1296 across 25 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking review defects: source inspection shows the PR enforces a global receipt guard while current main's built-in SMS message path returns receipt payloads without plugin metadata evidence. I did not run a live SMS send in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer revision is needed because missing real send-path proof, a plugin API acceptance decision, and the concrete message-delivery defects are pre-merge human gates.

target.title: fix(agents): verify side-effect confirmations with tool evidence
target.body:
## summary

OpenClaw's vision says the assistant should actually do things on a user's devices and channels. That makes confirmations part of the runtime contract. If the assistant says it sent a message, created a ticket, booked something, or called a provider API, the runtime should have evidence from the tool result in the same run.

This PR adds a generic evidence path for tool-backed side effects. The first detector handles SMS-style send confirmations because that is the failure case I could reproduce. The API shape is broader than SMS.

## problem

Today the assistant can report that an external action completed even when the current run has no matching tool evidence.

The failure mode is:

1. A tool call fails, is skipped, runs as dry run, or returns data that never gets tied to the final assistant text.
2. The assistant still says the action completed, sometimes with provider-looking status or ID fields.
3. The user treats that as a receipt and stops checking the external system.

The invariant this PR is trying to enforce is:

> User-visible confirmations of side effects should be backed by current-run evidence from the tool that performed the action.

That fits the project priorities in `VISION.md`: safer defaults, stability, messaging channel reliability, and better agent harness behavior.

## what changed

- Plugin tools can declare how to extract side-effect evidence from successful tool results.
- The runtime records evidence only for the plugin-owned tool that actually ran.
- Evidence is preserved across retry and failover attempts in the same run.
- Receipt-like assistant output is checked before user-visible delivery.
- The guard runs on terminal payloads, partial streaming replies, streamed block replies, and chunked block replies.
- SMS-style send confirmations are the first supported claim detector.

## scope

This is not a Dialpad feature and it is not intended to make SMS special. SMS is only the first concrete side-effect class covered by the detector because it exposed the bug.

The core issue belongs in the agent runtime because core owns retries, streaming delivery, terminal payload construction, and final user-visible text. Plugins can provide evidence, but core has to decide whether an unsupported completion claim is safe to deliver.

## linked context

- No exact existing issue or PR found for side-effect confirmation evidence before opening this PR.
- Related but not duplicate: #90998 covers SMS text command auth, not side-effect receipt evidence.

## real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: an agent could make a user-visible side-effect confirmation with provider-like fields even when the current run had no matching successful tool-result evidence.
- Concrete reproducible case used for this PR: SMS-style send receipt text with `Status: accepted/queued` and `Message ID`.
- Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout rebased onto upstream `origin/main` at `3c9cf2d5833d106713c640f806a1eb35827f3e0c`, commit `e94ac92c838977f6d009a417666a703d5ff3e4de`.
- Exact command run after this patch:

```bash
timeout -k5s 180s node scripts/run-vitest.mjs \
  src/agents/external-action-receipts.test.ts \
  src/agents/external-action-receipt-claims.test.ts \
  src/agents/external-action-receipt-guard.test.ts \
  src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/payloads.errors.test.ts \
  src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.tools.test.ts \
  src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.emits-block-replies-text-end-does-not.test.ts \
  src/plugins/contracts/host-hooks.contract.test.ts
```

- Evidence after fix:

```text
Test Files  4 passed (4)
Tests  83 passed (83)
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  64 passed (64)
Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  81 passed (81)
[test] passed 3 Vitest shards in 15.60s

unsupported= {"allowed":false,"claim":{"actionFamily":"sms","recipient":"+13522815065","sender":"+14155201316","providerId":"4797682962735104","status":"accepted/queued"},"replacementText":"I cannot verify that this SMS was sent. I do not have matching current-turn delivery evidence, so please check the messaging provider history or use the verified send flow before reporting it as sent."}
verified= {"allowed":true}
nonSms= {"allowed":true}
```

- Observed result after fix: unsupported receipt text is replaced before terminal payload delivery, partial streaming, streamed block replies, and chunked block replies. Matching current-run evidence allows the receipt. Non-SMS receipts are not classified as SMS by the first detector.
- What was not tested: a live provider send against production credentials was not performed in upstream proof.
- Proof limitation: the proof currently uses synthetic tool-result evidence shaped like provider output. ClawSweeper correctly asked for proof against the built-in message-tool send path before merge.
- Before evidence: the motivating regression was observed in a live operator workflow where the external provider UI/history did not show the claimed sent message even though the agent reported a sent/queued receipt.

## tests and validation

- `timeout -k5s 180s node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/external-action-receipts.test.ts src/agents/external-action-receipt-claims.test.ts src/agents/external-action-receipt-guard.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/payloads.errors.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.tools.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.emits-block-replies-text-end-does-not.test.ts src/plugins/contracts/host-hooks.contract.test.ts`
- `timeout -k5s 120s ./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.ts src/agents/external-action-receipt-claims.ts src/agents/external-action-receipt-guard.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.ts`
- `timeout -k5s 120s ./node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.ts src/agents/external-action-receipt-claims.ts src/agents/external-action-receipt-guard.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.ts`
- `git diff --check HEAD -- .`
- `timeout -k5s 900s codex review --base origin/main`: final review reported no discrete, actionable regressions before the final upstream rebase. Rebase onto latest upstream was clean and focused tests were rerun afterward.

## current review state

ClawSweeper found a real gap after the PR was opened: the built-in `message` tool send path can return receipt data, but it does not yet feed this evidence accumulator.

Before merge, this PR needs one of these fixes:

- record built-in message-tool send receipts into the same evidence model
- narrow enforcement to only paths that can currently produce evidence

It also still needs real provider or tool-path proof. The current tests cover the runtime behavior with synthetic tool-result evidence.

## risk checklist

- [x] Plugin metadata is owner-scoped by plugin ID plus tool name, so another plugin cannot spoof evidence metadata for a same-named tool.
- [x] Dry-run and failed results are not recorded as successful evidence.
- [x] Current-run evidence is accumulated across retry attempts.
- [x] Streamed partial replies, block replies, chunked block replies, and terminal payloads enforce the same receipt invariant.
- [x] Reply routing metadata is preserved when replacing unsupported receipt text.
- [x] Non-SMS receipts and explanatory SMS documentation are not treated as sent SMS receipts.
- [ ] Built-in message-tool send receipts still need to feed the evidence accumulator.
- [ ] Real provider/tool proof still needs to be added.

## size note

[size/exempt: safety invariant spans plugin metadata contract, evidence collection, retry accumulation, streamed replies, chunked block replies, terminal payloads, and regression tests; splitting would leave a non-enforcing partial change.]

## AI assistance

This PR was authored with Codex. Local Codex review was run and actionable findings were addressed. Testing depth is listed above.
target.author: kesslerio

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
